summary: Completed backend testing for 3 critical bug fixes: 1) Auto-seeding FAQs/Collections on startup - VERIFIED working (17 FAQs, 31 Collections exist), 2) Order ticket creation - VERIFIED working (orders create tickets with ticket_id = order_id), 3) Customer name display - VERIFIED working (parentName correctly mapped to member.name in concierge queue)

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Seeded production data disappearing upon redeployment
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: auto_seed_critical_data() function in server.py seeds FAQs and Collections if empty on startup
bugs_verified_fixed.evidence: 17 FAQs and 31 Collections exist in database, auto-seeding confirmed working

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: New orders placed via frontend not generating tickets in Command Center
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: create_order endpoint in order_routes.py calls create_ticket_from_event for cake orders
bugs_verified_fixed.evidence: Test order ORD-20260123-VERIFYDB62 created ticket with same ID, ticket found in concierge queue with correct member info

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Tickets showing 'Unknown Customer' instead of member's name
bugs_verified_fixed.fix: concierge_routes.py normalizes member data to handle 'parentName' field from checkout
bugs_verified_fixed.evidence: Orders in queue show correct member.name from customer.parentName field

seed_data_creation: Test orders created for verification: ORD-20260123-VERIFYDB62
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 critical bugs have been verified as fixed. Auto-seeding works on startup, order ticket creation is working (ticket_id = order_id for cake orders), and parentName field is correctly mapped to member.name in concierge queue. Backend is stable.

api_endpoints_verified./api/orders (POST): Creates order and auto-creates ticket with same ID
api_endpoints_verified./api/orders/{id} (GET): Retrieves order with customer data preserved
api_endpoints_verified./api/concierge/queue: Returns queue items with proper member.name from parentName
api_endpoints_verified./api/concierge/item/{ticket_id}: Returns ticket detail with correct member info
